title: GBN Framwork
description: This mod is used in certain GBN Industrial modpacks
body:
This mod now has recipes :D

This mod was created for, and intended to be used in, Generic Brand Name modpacks. You are free to use this mod in your own modpacks, and I encourage it since it has a few great features!

Mod includes:
- 
- A new dimension with a rare ore, bismuth, which can be used for whatever you want because you have to make the recipes anyways. To access it, use a bismuth and steel on the ancient city "portal" frame.
- C4 for breaking through walls
- A special bismuth beacon which will fill an area with blocks
- Butterscotch pie
- Wireless redstone generator
- Floodlight, a really cool light source
- Violin Stone, because it needed to be here
- A few other joke items :)
